mapper.sql: id, from_user_id, to_user_id, name, description, status, read_status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM work_order WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET from_user_id=#{fromUserId},to_user_id=#{toUserId},name=#{name},description=#{description},updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE work_order SET deleted_at=NOW(),updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE work_order SET status=2,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND status=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE work_order SET read_status=2,updated_at=NOW() WHERE id=#{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM work_order WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
